## Improvements

- Keep standard-page navigation stable when switching tabs or detail pages rapidly.
- Track the accepted WebView navigation chain instead of trusting only a global load id.
- Allow valid in-flow redirects to finish normally without losing the target page state.

## Fixes

- Fix quick A -> B navigation occasionally snapping back to the already-finished A page.
- Fix stale `onPageFinished` and bridge payload callbacks overwriting the current target tab.
- Fix superseded standard-page loads waiting for timeout instead of ending immediately.
- Fix background revalidation clearing the wrong loading state after a newer navigation starts.

## Packaging

- Bump the app version to `1.2.0+3`.
- Add regression tests for superseded loads, stale same-tab results, stale cross-tab callbacks, and accepted redirects.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/huangusaki/EasyCopy/compare/v1.1.0...v1.2.0
